evals.name: homolog-search
evals.prompt: I've got two protein FASTA files in ~/Desktop/vivarium/tests/data/ : query.faa (3 proteins from a Shewanella strain) and target_proteome.faa (the proteome of a related strain). Find the homolog of each query protein in the target and give me the best hit for each — percent identity, e-value, and query coverage.

evals.name: identify-unknown
evals.prompt: I pulled this one protein sequence out of an assembly — it's at ~/Desktop/vivarium/tests/data/mystery.faa and I have no idea what it is. Search it against the reference proteome ~/Desktop/vivarium/tests/data/target_proteome.faa and tell me what it most likely is, with the evidence.

evals.name: no-homolog
evals.prompt: Does the proteome at ~/Desktop/vivarium/tests/data/target_proteome.faa contain a homolog of the protein at ~/Desktop/vivarium/tests/data/random.faa ? Search it and tell me.
